name: Mrs Lee's Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, water, and corn syrup in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches the hard ball stage (235°F/112°C on a candy thermometer).
3. In a large bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually add the hot sugar syrup to the beaten egg whites, mixing gently until well combined.
5. Stir in vanilla extract and chopped nuts.
6. Pour the batter onto wax paper.
7. Use a knife or drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the wax paper to create small candy pieces.
8. Allow the candies to cool completely before serving.
